title: chamaemelum elongatum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, also known as Chrysanthemum or Roman Chamomile, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its calming and soothing properties, which are attributed to its essential oils containing chamazulene, bisabolol, and other bioactive compounds. Roman Chamomile has been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. It can be prepared as a tea, used in essential oil form, or added to skincare products, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
